mechanics.excerpt: By this act; the mercenary unit carved its Own fiefdom out of Katherine realm: In the oddest turn of events the Wolves who had battled the Jade Falcons briefly merged with that Clan ad then won freedom from their Jade Falcon conquerors_ This new Clan, led by the highly intelligent Khan Vladimir Ward briefly called itself Clan Jade Wolf until Vlad killed Falcon Khan Elias Crichell. That act gave him the clout to revive nis Clan as the new' Clan Wolf.
